summary:
SURVEILLANCE TECHNOLOGY AND THE BEAST SYSTEM: Brandon recounts observing military drones over Oklahoma, asserting that the government uses advanced, undisclosed technology for surveillance and crowd control. Brandon explains that these drones, along with upcoming energy pulse weapons capable of rendering crowds unconscious, are part of an emerging Beast system. Brandon warns that artificial intelligence and robotics will soon replace human soldiers on battlefields, mentioning a specific catastrophic weapon to be deployed over Warsaw, Poland, and the development of a superbug.

ECONOMIC COLLAPSE AND WEALTH TRANSFER: Brandon shares prophetic insights regarding an impending economic crash, where the United States dollar loses half its purchasing power and banks freeze loans due to national debt. Brandon details a transition to a fully digital One World Currency system utilizing cryptocurrencies, specifically mentioning the Iraqi Dinar and XRP as foundational elements. According to Brandon, megachurches will face foreclosure during this crash, but a small remnant of believers will experience a massive wealth transfer, allowing them to fund future revivals and support those in need.

FAITH AND FINANCIAL PROSPERITY: Brandon discusses the biblical laws of seedtime and harvest, encouraging listeners to believe for significant financial returns in 2025. Brandon recounts receiving a divine message to think bigger and expand mental capacities for prosperity. Brandon shares personal anecdotes, including how his father achieved success in selling cars by laying hands on them and making vows to God, instructing listeners to similarly claim their job promotions, debt cancellations, and successful real estate transactions by making a ten percent tithe vow.

HIDDEN MEDICAL CURES AND DIVINE HEALING: Brandon discusses a cure for cancer that is allegedly being suppressed by demonic strongholds. Brandon references statements by Elon Musk regarding a highly effective cancer pill and states his belief that political figures like RFK will eventually release these hidden cures to the public. Brandon also declares physical healing over various ailments, including cancer, high blood pressure, diabetes, and sleep disorders, asserting that believers have the authority to command sickness to leave their bodies.

GLOBAL REVIVAL AND POLITICAL INTERCESSION: Brandon describes a vision for a massive upcoming revival, referring to it as a Holy Ghost Woodstock, and states that God is extending the current timeframe before the Tribulation to allow for a global harvest of souls. Brandon specifically mentions a desire to see prominent figures like Elon Musk, Kim Kardashian, and Taylor Swift convert to Christianity. Furthermore, Brandon prays for the protection of Donald Trump and his family, the halting of border wall sales, and a widespread spiritual awakening across Hollywood, South Korea, and the broader Asian continent.
rawData: [December 18, 2024]-[A call to prayer - day 59]-[https://youtu.be/WkE7SzHKJKk]-[Good morning, family. Praise the Lord. Day 59. I hope you all enjoyed the Christmas lights yesterday. We sure did; it was awesome. Walking around, Megan seemed to have a real good time. She liked to look at the ducks more than anything; she wanted those ducks to eat that popcorn so bad. We stood there for a while off-camera and tried to get those ducks to come over, but those ducks were not having it. God is so good; I love all His little creatures He's made. Like Bob Ross—he takes Peanut the pocket squirrel and has those little pigeons and all that stuff he used to carry around with him when he was painting those pictures. We loved all that; we still watch those reruns. My son used to pretend he was Bob Ross and paint pictures for me. God is good, and I just love His nature. Thank you for joining us yesterday; we appreciate it, Diana. We think it's fun and thought about doing more vlogs like that so you all can see our day and go around with us, but it's something different every once in a while. We made fun of it regarding the Bubba and the drones flying over. They don't just fly over Oklahoma; they're looking for something. Those are military; they have to be. We have one of the most top-secret governments in the world, and you're telling me we have hundreds of these drones flying around and they're like, 'Well, we don't know what they are'? Baloney, y'all! They do know what they are. I told you this is something they're going to start using all the time; this is going to be a way of life for what's coming. They're going to start using these drones everywhere. We don't even have the next administration in, and he's talking about shooting them out of the sky because he's not being briefed on the security all the way, it sounds like. For people to sit there and say, 'Well, I got a prophetic word,' and some people saying it's aliens—maybe I'm wrong, maybe it is, but I feel in my heart it's a desensitizing of things. We are seeing the Beast system unfolding right in front of our faces: how they're going to use technology to track you. They're just playing a poker match and bringing out their cards, showing you they have a full house. They're one-up on you, and you're still stuck on the technology from five or ten years ago. They're light-years ahead of you. They've got technology that you don't have any clue about. I've told you about that pulse thing that they're going to bring out for crowd control. If they can't use firearms on people, they're just going to knock people out in the crowd, and it will look like they just passed out everywhere instead of using gas or smoke from riots. Whenever people are looting and acting nuts, they use gas and pepper spray to make the crowds obey. They'll just use this new technology, and people will fall like flies. I'm telling you, it's coming. When I went to tribulation with the Lord, all the things He showed me we're starting to see more and more on the news. You all don't realize how close we are to His coming. I told you we would start to see more signs in the heavens, and the drones are just part of the surveillance in society. They're going to start doing this in China, Europe, and the Middle East. We're going to start seeing this everywhere, and people will become more used to it instead of saying, 'Is it delivering a package?' No, it's just a police drone circling and surveilling the area to make sure people are safe. Interesting. So, nothing to be alarmed about, folks. Jesus is coming; this is just part of the Beast system coming to pass. It's exciting because I know what comes next: a massive revival that's about to take place and an outpouring of finances. The Lord showed me even this yesterday. When I was driving home from the lights, the Lord said, 'Brandon, I want you to drive around for a bit; I have some things I have to talk to you about.' I told Diana, 'We can't go home yet; the Lord wants to talk.' So I just started driving and praying in the spirit. Deep groanings came in the spirit; I started interceding, and it was like a waterfall coming up out of me. Diana and the kids were just praying and interceding for what the Lord wanted to talk about. It was about what's coming with the finances; He was giving me impartation about what's coming. He told me we're not believing big enough and to enlarge our capacity in our minds to think bigger by reading His word, to believe Him for exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think. He said, 'I want you to think about that: how much can you think for over and above all that you think?' I can think some big things, folks. Can you believe God for big? You have all kinds of hopes, desires, and dreams, don't you? As a man thinks in his heart, so is he. The Lord was showing me, 'Brandon, I'm going to do even exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask me for or think.' He was talking about the thinking part because people can think big, but He said, 'Brandon, you've got to even think bigger than what you think because of what I'm about to do in this earth.' Folks, He's about to show up and show off in your life. I hear the sound of an abundance of rain, and the camels are coming, loaded down with everything you've been believing God for, everything you've stretched your hand out and sowed to believe sacrificially. Do you ever take a calculator to what you've sowed over the course? Maybe you have a record of it. Even the seeds that you may have forgotten about, ask the Holy Spirit to help you remember all the things that you have sowed in the past. He said some thirty, some sixty, and some hundredfold. Take a calculator and do the math on what is being laid up for you. Seedtime and harvest: seed sowing is a law, but harvest is a law just as much. The Lord told me that reaping is just as much a law as sowing. We have got to learn that it's time for us to reap. He said you will reap if you faint not. But a lot of you give up on your old seed. You go, 'Well, it didn't come to pass over the last five years, so I guess that seed's dead.' I believe the Lord said the seeds you have sowed in the past will come to harvest at last. In 2025, you're going to see a multiplication of your harvest time. The sowers and the reapers are going to start going hand in hand, and as you sow, you're going to start to reap instantaneously. What you say out of your mouth and what you believe in your heart is going to start to come to pass. I believe with all my heart this is a time for you to believe big: spiritually, physically, emotionally, and mentally. You may say, 'I don't need finances; I'm rich.' Well, you may need something in your body. God is a healer, and He said, 'Beloved, I wish above all things that you prosper and be in health, even as your soul prospers.' Prosperity is not just about finances; it's about living in wholeness mentally, emotionally, physically, and financially. Your marriage—people go, 'I'm rich and whole in my body, but my marriage is terrible and my kids talk to me terribly.' That's not whole. He wants you to be made whole through everything abundantly above all that you dare ask or think. I want my marriage good, my children healthy, my health good, and a good job. Do you see? He wants you to live an abundant life. The Lord told me from Rosh Hashanah to Rosh Hashanah, which was last October, you'll start to see first the blade, then the ear, then the full manifestation on that ear. The Lord told me you would start to see the glory in different levels: ankle-deep, knee-deep, waist-deep, and over the top. It's time to go down to the bottom of that pool at His altar. I believe it's a time like never before that we are joint heirs of Jesus Christ and we display kingliness. We show it off so that people see that inside of us. Yes, all this stuff's going on around us, and there's a lot of drama on the news every day. But my goodness, y'all, we're about to see the glorious church rise and the greatest harvest of souls this world has ever known. It's all going to come through you, for you were called to the kingdom for such a time as this. I'm seeing people freaking out on the news, but it's just part of it. They're using the drones for surveillance; they're looking for something. It's not aliens or spooky stuff; it's technology you don't even realize they have. They're orbs and all this other stuff coming in and out of the water. We're looking at AI technology now, but they've had AI for probably twenty years and just never brought it out to the public until now. What are they hiding behind closed doors that's 'freaky out' stuff? Like the AWACS or the stealth bomber—that was a big deal, but how long did they have that before they brought it to the public? That technology is ancient compared to what they're doing now. Trust me, they've got brilliant people using technology and computers that would blow your mind. The drone is old news, but they're going to use them and it's going to become mainstream. It's going to be like the Terminator; they'll have robots out fighting battles soon. They won't even put soldiers on the field; they'll be fighting robots. Seriously, that's what I told you all we're about to see. And over Poland, I believe by Warsaw, a weapon that has never been used before on this earth—something catastrophic. We pray against it, but we will see wars, rumors of wars, plagues, and pestilence. AI technology is creating a superbug. I told you that was coming; it's still coming. When I've been interceding, things have been delayed because the Lord said, 'My people prayed in October.' As He said in His word: 'If my people who are called by my name will humble themselves and pray and turn from their wicked ways...' It's happening, folks. He is a God of His word. He stands by His covenant. Now He's watching to see what we will do with it. Will you go back into your slumber? He said, 'I'm giving you a window; what will you do with it?' I'm seeing on the other side of that window, and very dark days are coming. What will you do with this time? I'm telling you, the rocket ship is taking off, and Trump is going to bring in a whole new system. In the dot-com era of time with Elon Musk, it will be just like then whenever they brought in the internet. When they brought in the internet, everything changed. I remember as a kid we thought it was cool just to have a Nintendo or a Sega. We had a Sega and we played those games, and boy, that was big technology then. Those little guys on the screen look so goofy now when I look back at that, but that was so cool as a kid. Boy, we wanted to play that every day we got home from school. My goodness, it was a big deal. But now we look at what they have, and then the internet came out and we didn't know what it was. So we did the AOL chat online thing; we talked to those people from all over the world. My sister would go in there and they had those chat rooms, and we thought this was the coolest thing ever because we're talking to somebody in New York. And then it became bigger and bigger, but they brought laws in and they started making the internet not like the Wild West; they made it have regulations and laws. I'm telling you, that's what they're going to do with crypto, and it will be like the dot-com era and it will explode in the days ahead. They will adopt it, and it is part of the Beast system. It will be part of the Beast system, the One World Currency, all digital. I saw the dollar fall. Remember I told you all it was like on a flagpole? I saw a $100 bill on the flagpole and I saw the purchasing power of it went to half; the dollar was only worth about fifty cents. I saw the dollar crash and I saw digital writing come on the flagpole as it started to fade out and went into digital, like crypto lines. Back then, whenever the Lord showed me this, there was not much about crypto; I didn't pay any attention to it. But it started turning into digital code moving, and that's just like crypto. I saw the dollar turn into a digital dollar and it went to a digital platform like crypto. The Lord showed me the dollars in the bank were worthless and the bank seized them. And I've warned you—this is another thing the Lord showed me—that the banks would not loan soon, that the house of cards would fall, and that you would see interest rates and everything skyrocket. Soon there would be a loaning freeze. The banks would not loan the money because of the credit and all of the debt of America. I saw banks not loaning money out on houses and cars. I'm telling you, a 1930s-style crash will come eventually; you will see this. I saw a great humbling coming. But before I saw this coming, I saw a wealth transfer. And that's why I always thought, 'Lord,' because whenever I'm seeing a part or hearing a part, I think, 'Well, it's right in front of my face; it's going to happen.' But the Lord has always shown me that there was a group of people—he calls them the Remnant. The Remnant will walk in a financial blessing and prosperity—not everybody, because he told me, 'Certain people will make it to the starting line, Brandon. They will make it to the starting line because they've listened to all the prophetic voices, but they will not run the race and make it because it's a marathon.' Because they're not listening to me, they will not be able to listen to the people on the internet for what's coming; they have to have a personal relationship with me so that they will make it through the marathon for what's coming. I saw a group of people, and it was a very small group, like half a percentage—like a 1% group—that walks in an extreme amount of wealth. I saw the megachurches that had mega loans, huge loans on their buildings; I saw them being foreclosed on because when the dollar crashes and things happen, the people will not be able to fund those megachurches. So the banks will recall those loans and foreclose on those buildings because they don't want the churches going anyway. But I saw all this stuff taking place and I saw people having revival in fields. I saw, like I told you all, 'Holy Ghost Woodstock.' I see things over the course of the last five years of what he showed me, and whenever I can put them together, you can make a picture of what he's trying to say because all of them connect like a puzzle. But he said the finances would happen first, and that's whenever I saw the Iraqi Dinar re-establishing. I saw XRP; I saw these cryptos; I saw this stuff happening first. And then I saw a wealth transfer. I saw the abundance of money come into the Body of Christ, and then I saw them distributing it and learning how to keep it so they don't lose it. And then I saw a crash. When this happens, I saw those people able to help take care of the ones that didn't have it, making sure the Gospel did not suffer, making sure the Gospel was taken care of and that God's word still got out, because it takes finances to do that. I'm telling you, the Lord's not going to lack any good thing. He knows what's coming and just like he told Joseph—I heard him say, 'Just like I took care of Joseph, Brandon, for the seven years of plentiful and seven years of famine, I'm going to do the same with you to the ones that are listening.' But see, Joseph was the only one that heard it, and he told all the others because he interpreted the dream. They brought in the stuff and then he took care of the ones that needed it. But it made them into bondage because they weren't listening for it themselves. You have to follow the voice of the Lord for your life for what's coming. It is vital that you make it through this for your family, that you hear him on what's coming. Folks, very hard days are coming for folks; some of them are going to go without, and it will be a very humbling time. People will say, for what I have seen coming, that this is an Ichabod—God is mad. But he said, 'No, it's not an Ichabod.' Do you understand? For some of the things I've seen coming, you say, 'Brandon, you told us all this was coming in 2025.' The Lord said, 'I'm giving you extended time because you prayed.' He said, 'I want not that one should perish, but all come to repentance.' But in this timeframe, because we prayed and we see Trump coming and we see him bringing in the crypto, we see him doing this—he's establishing the Beast Kingdom. It is what it is, folks; it's what's going to happen regardless of what we want to see happen. This is Bible, and we will see a One World Currency. I believe there are certain cryptos, the Five Pillars, that will be the foundation for a one currency. But it's all done by computers, and it will be done by the chips, and it will be done by satellites, and it will be done all by this weird stuff going on—drones and how they track people. So we're seeing it, and it's exciting because I know what's coming next, and Jesus is getting ready to come back for his bride. But it's not time yet; he wants a harvest. People get mad about that and say, 'Well, I hope he's coming back tomorrow,' and I'm like, 'Yes, but your cousin that's not born again is going to go through the Tribulation; they have a great opportunity to go to hell.' I'm telling you, there's a lot of people that I'm believing God for, like an Elon Musk or a Kim Kardashian or Taylor Swift or some major actor that needs Jesus Christ. If they don't get him, they're going to hell. I'm like, 'Man, what an opportunity to win the lost! What an opportunity to show them and display Jesus to these people, to lay hands on the sick and see them recover.' That we would be those people that are the salt of the earth, that they show the light like never before. So I don't know, I'm excited, y'all. I know I've talked about this before, but it needs to be talked about again and again because I know faith cometh by hearing, and it will help you to know what's coming. The drones are just part of the plan. And then we see Elon Musk talking on this video about the cure for cancer and it being held back, and that it's really there. I told you all, I prophesied this, and I told you that a cure for cancer is coming. He even talks about the company, but it's not the company that the Lord showed me—this was a supplement. But Elon Musk said it's a pill, and it delivered his friend's mother from stage four cancer; they gave her five months to live and her taking this pill completely cured her body. The Lord said, 'I will make cancer a thing of the past.' We're seeing what he's talking about, and it's being held up. The Lord showed me this is being blocked by a demonic stronghold; take authority over it. And RFK—I believe I just got that right—RFK, I believe, will go in and release this stuff to the people because he wants people to get better. I believe it because the Lord told me it's personal with him. So let's just believe God for people to have a backbone. Let's believe God that we have good days ahead of us, that the church will stand and be that light—that we're not broke, busted, and disgusted, with people looking at us going, 'I just want to stay away from those hypocrites.' That we finally show up and show off Jesus; we draw people to Jesus. My job on this channel is to always turn you towards him, to look to him, to have a relationship with him. So Father, we just thank you for your word. We thank you for the signs of the times and where we are in these last days. Thank you, Father. Thank you, Lord, that we shut the doors that are open, because when we open the doors, the enemy comes in and tries to wreak havoc in people's lives. So we shut the doors to sin, we shut the doors to addiction, we shut the doors to strife, we shut the doors to alcoholism, to drugs, to cigarettes, to pornographies, to cussing—to whatever. We shut the door to sin. Father, I thank you, Lord, that you said that we are overcomers by the blood of the Lamb and by the word of our testimony. I thank you, Father, that you've redeemed us and you've set us free from the bondage from hell. We will not bow our knee to Baal anymore. We worship and we will honor our covenant with you, Father. I thank you that you've set us free by your word. As we renew our mind with the word of God, as we renew our thinking with the word of God, you said, 'Renew your mind daily.' For he said, 'If ye abide in me and my words remain in you, ye shall ask what ye will and it shall be done.' I thank you, Father, that we ask what your word says; we ask and we believe for big. We believe for exceedingly abundantly above all that we dare ask or think. Father, I speak to their bodies, I speak to their hearts. We pray over their hearts and we have authority over those hearts. We have authority over those lungs, we have authority over their digestive systems, we have authority over their livers and over their colons and over whatever they may need, Lord. You said we have authority in all three realms: Heaven, Earth, and Hell. We say in the name of Jesus, 'Cancer, you are a name, and at the name of Jesus, you are underneath our feet.' We speak to that cancer in the name of Jesus and their bodies and we say, 'Go now in Jesus' name.' Breast cancer, you go; colon cancer, you go; polyps, go in Jesus' name. We call pancreas and liver and all kinds of leukemia and all kinds of things that deal with the blood—we say you are healed and whole and well in Jesus' name. We thank you, Lord, that you're the God of all that we need, all that we dare hope or imagine or think. In our bodies, Lord, you said you took our infirmities and you bore our sicknesses. I thank you, Lord, according to your word, that by your stripes we are healed. We believe that, Lord, that we have a covenant with you. We thank you, Lord, that we're healed and whole and well, and we receive it now. You already paid the price; you already delivered us from sickness and disease. I thank you, Father, that your healing power flows on the inside of them right now in the name of Jesus, from the top of their head to the soles of their feet; nothing's too big and nothing's too small. Jesus paid the price for it all. I believe, Father, for their healing over their body. For high blood pressure, we thank you, Lord, that high blood pressure is healed. We thank you, Lord, that diabetes is healed. I thank you, Lord, that even glaucoma, cataracts, ear problems, deafness—we call healing over their bodies in Jesus' name. Over their minds, that they have a sound mind, Father; that they're not tormented in night terrors and sleep terrors or bad sleep. You give your beloved restful, peaceful sleep in the name of Jesus. We believe that when they lay their head on a pillow, they sleep soundly. I believe, Father, their hormones are lined up. Over their epinephrine—we speak to their epinephrine, we speak to their cortisol levels, and we say in the name of Jesus you are healed and whole and well. I thank you, Father, that when they lay their head on the pillow tonight, they rest and they rest soundly. They have deep, sound sleep—refreshing, renewing sleep. Father, we thank you, Lord, that you're the God of overflow for the finances. Father, let them be in the right place at the right time. It's a time of great acceleration of favor. Father, give them favor with their boss, favor with their neighbor, favor with financial things, selling a house—whatever they need to do, Father, they will have favor. I call your house sold in the name of Jesus! We call the buyers in from the north, the south, the east, the west, and we call that house sold right now in Jesus' name. We believe for the right buyer, Father, that's a cash buyer; we call for cash buyers for our properties in the name of Jesus. Father, we thank you, Lord, that if they need a buyer for their house, we call that house sold and we call it sold for top dollar in the name of Jesus. And when it sells, Lord, we'll give you all the glory, honor, and praise, and we'll give tithes off of it. Father, make a vow with the Lord: 'Father, you help me sell my house and I vow to you I will give ten percent to the Kingdom of God.' Make a vow to Him. Father, when you sell this house, I vow to give ten percent to the Kingdom. Watch what happens and be honorable whenever it happens to do what you said you would do—sow the seed and reap the harvest. I believe this is a time that you will see the demonstration of seedtime and harvest in a greater capacity. Father, we make a vow to you. And then say, 'I'm believing for my cars to sell.' My dad for the longest time would go—he worked at the car dealership and he would sell cars—and he would go in the lot and lay hands on those cars and say, 'Father, I'm going to be top salesman at this car dealership every month in the name of Jesus, that I'll sell more cars than anybody else. I call in buyers from the north, south, east, and west. Angels, go get my buyers and bring them to me.' So he would lay hands on those cars. He was the top salesman of that car dealership six months in a row. They would put his picture on the wall for January, February, March, April, May. That's the way my dad learned how to live by faith, even laying hands on the cars—he sold Nissans. After they saw him selling cars so much, they promoted him to manager, assistant manager, and then manager over an Infiniti store and then over Acura. That's what I'm trying to tell you all: if you call those things that be not as though they were, and you speak to your stuff and lay hands on your house and then make a vow to God, say, 'I vow that I will give you ten percent of this, Father. I thank you, Lord, that you'll bring in my buyer; you'll bring it to pass.' I believe this in the name of Jesus. Now go, ministering spirits, and cause it to come forth! Father, I thank you. Somebody's out there believing for a job. Father, I thank you, Lord, that I have a job that's the desire of my heart. I'm going to write it down. Write down what you're believing for: 'I'm believing for a job that does this and this.' Make sure you're qualified for it and then call it in. I call this job in and look for it, and help me, Lord, find that. You may have to move somewhere to find it, but the Lord's going to bring it to pass. I believe that this is a time like never before that we will see the Body of Christ be the head, not the tail. So Father, we thank you, Lord, that we call those things that be not as though they were. We say we have jobs and better jobs—there are raises and bonuses, benefits, sales, and commission. In 2025 I'll have the greatest raise I've ever had in any job I've ever had. 2025 will be the year of the raise for me in Jesus' name. I'll have an amazing promotion in my job in 2025. Whenever it does, sow a seed and give God honor for that. The Bible says that David said he didn't give God something that cost him nothing. That's the way I believe: you say, 'This cost me something, and this is something that's special to me.' It's honorable when you do that for the Lord—sowing into your church, sowing to your pastor or whoever's ministering to you. Help if your church has a note on their building and your pastor is believing for the church note to be paid; say, 'Hey, I'm going to give an extra whatever, I'm going to sow a seed,' and I'm believing God for my house to be paid off in 2025. I'm believing for a car to be debt-free in 2025—this is my car seed. If you have a need, you sow a seed. That's what I'm trying to tell y'all. When I'm praying, that's what I keep hearing: people are believing for their houses to sell, they're believing for relocation—you're wanting to be around a church that preaches the truth. It takes putting your boat into motion. So Father, I thank you, Lord, for the word; it's life-changing. I only say what I've seen you do in my life. I believe, Father, that this is a time like no other, that it's time to believe God for big. There are so many people that are believing you for something big. Lord, we thank you, Father, for President Trump today. We thank you, Father, that he is protected—that you protect his children, you protect his wife, you protect his marriage. We thank you, Lord, that you protect his children from any kind of attempts on their lives. We plead the blood of Jesus over his children right now in the name of Jesus, and we thank you, Lord, that you bring in the Secret Service angels to watch over President Trump, that no assassination attempt will come nigh him. I thank you, Lord, that they would stop trying to sell the border wall; we believe, Father, that the plan of the enemy is going to come down and that there will be criminal accountability to this. Now Father, I thank you, Lord, for South Korea for all that you've told me about them. Father, there's a great revival happening in Asia. I call forth a revival all around this globe, that we will see the greatest harvest of souls. I thank you, Father, that this is a time like never before for the supernatural. God, we want it, and we are calling those things in right now. We thank you, Lord, that Elon Musk is born again and that Hollywood will have a move of the Spirit like never before. Lord, I thank you, Lord, that you know even before we need to know. Father, I feel in my heart to help people pray over their houses today. We thank you, Lord, that there will be a blessed year ahead of us and we thank you, Lord, for this Christmas season. Happy Birthday, Jesus, we love you. And everybody say Amen and Amen. Well, thank you for joining me today. I try not to go too long for the AI technology for South Korea, but my son can make two videos on these, I guess. Thank you all for joining me. My green screen fell down, kind of embarrassing, but now that the white couch shows back up, well, thank you for joining me today, y'all. We really appreciate it. We'll be back again tomorrow.
